changes.value:
**File:** `kanban-app/ui/src/components/quick-capture.tsx:92`

```ts
if (event.payload.entity_type === "board") loadBoards();
```

Hardcodes "board" entity type check for refresh trigger. Also constructs board entities with hardcoded `"name"` field.
quick-capture.tsx: hardcoded "board" entity type and "task.add" command
